_comment: Workbook-free seed snapshot of wc.db (teams + team_form + matches), written by scripts/snapshot_db.py and replayed by scripts/seed_from_snapshot.py. This is the source of truth that replaces WorldCup2026_Analytics_Companion.xlsx. power_ratings/predictions are derived (recompute), so they're intentionally absent.
